2025-01-01 2025-03-31 2025 Q1 2025-03-31 125

Part I

Item 1. Financial Statements

Unaudited financial statements are presented for the quarter.

Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis

Quarterly MD&A discusses liquidity, revenue, debt, and NAV-like operating measures.

Item 3. Quantitative and Qualitative Disclosures About Market Risk

Foreign currency and interest-rate market risk were monitored.

Item 4. Controls and Procedures

Controls remained effective.

Part II

Item 1. Legal Proceedings

No material legal proceedings.

Item 1A. Risk Factors

Risk factors changed due to tomato supply constraints.
